name: CSC Sahayak
description: CSC Co-Pilot — Helps Common Service Centre operators fill government forms faster with fewer rejections.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5000 http://localhost:5000 https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.cloudfunctions.net wss://*.firebaseio.com https://firestore.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://api.groq.com
